summary: SINGLE_FOCUS NumberPlane with BLUE circle of R=2 and RED hole at origin. Two ValueTrackers: wind_tr toured through 1, 2, 3, -1, 0.5, 1 changes winding count of always_redraw YELLOW loop γ(t)=r·(cos wt, sin wt) with r=c·(2+0.4 sin 3t); contract_tr shrinks wind=0 loop to point (homotopy to identity), then restores and tries wind=1 which blocks.
